tasks.label: Build Android AAB (Release)
tasks.command: dotnet build src/Android/Android.csproj -c Release -p:AndroidKeyStore=true -p:AndroidSigningKeyStore=${workspaceFolder}/android-upload.keystore -p:AndroidSigningKeyAlias=release -p:AndroidSigningKeyPass=${env:ANDROID_SIGNING_KEY_PASS} -p:AndroidSigningStorePass=${env:ANDROID_SIGNING_STORE_PASS} -p:AndroidSdkDirectory=/workspaces/android-sdk && mkdir -p ${workspaceFolder}/release && cp ${workspaceFolder}/src/Android/bin/Release/net10.0-android/de.openelp.regatta-Signed.aab ${workspaceFolder}/release/
